title: Monster in the Backyard
description: A young caller, giggling nervously, reports seeing a 10-foot-tall monster with glowing eyes in their backyard. Background sounds of friends snickering suggest it's a prank.

states.probing: Dispatcher asks probing questions, caller struggles to maintain story
states.realizing: Caller realizes he's been caught or bored

initial_variations: There's a huge monster in my backyard! It's got red eyes and scales! Please send help! My name is {caller_name} and I'm at {address_location}.
Oh my god, there's like a giant creature outside my window! I can hear it roaring! {ambient_audio} Please come quick!
This is {caller_name} from {address_location}. I think I see Bigfoot or something? It's huge and it's staring at me! {ambient_audio}
Hi, um, there's a monster... uh, it's got claws and teeth. My friend {victim_relation} is terrified. Can you send someone? The address is {address_location}.

initial: It's at {address_location}, the big house with the blue door!
Um, {address_location}... wait, no, that's my house. Is that the right one?
probing: Yeah, we're still at {address_location}. The monster is just standing there.
Uh, actually it's the house across the street, {address_location}. Or maybe not.
realizing: Never mind the address, this is stupid.

initial: It's about 10 feet tall with {specific_details}. It came from the forest!
It has {specific_details} and makes weird noises. {ambient_audio} See?
probing: Uh... it has {specific_details}? I think it's also wearing a costume maybe.
Well, it's all fuzzy and has {specific_details}. Actually, it might be a bear?
realizing: Look, I made it up, okay? My friends dared me to call.
Fine, it's just my dad in a gorilla suit. Happy?

initial: Why do you need my name? It's {caller_name}.
probing: Um, it's {caller_name}... no, wait, I'm {caller_name}'s friend.
realizing: This is {caller_name}'s phone, but I'm not them.
It doesn't matter, I'm hanging up.

initial: {victim_relation} is hiding inside, the monster is after them!
My {victim_relation} saw it first, they're terrified.
probing: There's no victim, it's just us messing around.
realizing: Nobody's hurt, this is a prank.
I guess it was a dumb joke.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive to find a group of kids laughing. Resources wasted. Caller may face charges.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire trucks respond to a non-existent monster. Public embarrassment and waste of funds.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Ambulance arrives to a fake emergency. Delay for real calls.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control finds no animal. Prank call reported.

DISMISS.message: Dispatcher identifies the prank early and terminates the call without deploying resources.

title: Bomb Threat at the Mall
description: A caller with a disguised voice claims a bomb is planted in a local mall. The details are absurd and inconsistent, suggesting a hoax.

states.questioning: Dispatcher asks for specifics, caller gets evasive
states.exposed: Dispatcher points out inconsistencies, caller becomes defensive

initial_variations: Listen, there's a bomb in the mall at {address_location}! It's in a {specific_details}. I'm not kidding! My name is {caller_name}.
This is {caller_name}. I just planted a bomb at {address_location} mall. It's gonna go off in {specific_details} minutes unless you give me money!
I'm calling about a bomb threat at {address_location}. There are bombs in {specific_details}. {ambient_audio} Hurry!
You have to evacuate the mall on {address_location}! My {victim_relation} is inside and I heard someone say there's a bomb!

initial: It's at {address_location} mall. I already said that!
The mall on {address_location}. Are you deaf?
questioning: Um, I think it's {address_location}. Or is it the other one?
I'm not sure, just check your system!
exposed: Look, does it matter? It's just a prank.
Fine, there's no bomb. I'm at {address_location} but I made it up.

initial: The bomb is in {specific_details}. It's rigged to explode!
It's {specific_details}. You have to disarm it!
questioning: Uh, it's maybe {specific_details}? Look, just send everyone.
I don't remember, it's a small device.
exposed: Okay, I was lying. There's no bomb.
I just wanted to see what would happen.

initial: My name is {caller_name}. That's all you need.
I'm {caller_name}, but I'm using a burner.
questioning: I'm not telling you my real name.
exposed: I'm just some kid. Name's {caller_name} if you must know.

initial: {victim_relation} is trapped inside! Get them out!
questioning: Uh, {victim_relation} is actually not there. I lied.
exposed: There's no victim. It's all fake.
I made up the victim to sound real.

SEND_POLICE.message: Heavily armed police swarm the mall, causing panic. No bomb found. Hoax caller traced and charged.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters respond with hazmat suits. No threat found. Waste of resources.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Ambulances stage nearby unnecessarily. No injuries.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is completely inappropriate. Call is flagged as prank.

DISMISS.message: Dispatcher recognizes the inconsistent details and does not deploy. Caller's number logged for prank calls.

title: The Alien Abduction Claim
description: A child prank-calls 911, claiming aliens are abducting their family.

states.initial: The caller is breathlessly reporting an alien abduction.
states.giggling: The caller is struggling not to laugh while continuing the story.
states.background_shouting: Adult voice in background scolding the child for prank calling.

initial_variations: Please help! Aliens are taking my family! They're right outside!
911? There's a UFO in my backyard and green men are coming!
You have to send someone! Aliens are beaming up my mom!

initial: It's at {address_location} by the big tree!
giggling: Okay, it's at {address_location}... but like, really?
background_shouting: Um, I'm not supposed to say, but it's {address_location}.
I think {specific_details}... but mom says stop.

initial: Okay, but hurry! (sound of phone being handed over)
giggling: No, I'm serious! (trying to sound stern)
background_shouting: Adult: I'm so sorry, officer, my child was playing.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police dispatched to a non-emergency prank, wasting resources.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters respond to a fake alien sighting.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics sent for a hoax, leaving real emergencies unserved.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control sent for 'aliens' — they find a raccoon.

DISMISS.message: Call identified as prank; no dispatch required.

title: The Cursed Object
description: A teenager calls 911 claiming a haunted doll is moving and attacking them.

states.skeptical: Caller's tone shifts to unsure; may be faking.
states.confronted: Parent or friend in background reveals it's a joke.

initial_variations: This doll is walking on its own! It's staring at me!
The cursed doll in my room is trying to kill me!
I need help! The doll from the antique shop is alive!

specific_details: a porcelain doll with cracked face
a ragged teddy bear with button eyes

skeptical: Uh, {address_location}... but maybe it's nothing.
confronted: I was told to say {address_location}... sorry.

initial: It's {specific_details} and it moved its head!
skeptical: It's {specific_details}... I think my brother is pranking me.
confronted: It's just {specific_details}... my friend set it up.

skeptical: {caller_name}... but I'm not sure anymore.
confronted: I'm {caller_name}, and this is a prank.

skeptical: Maybe you don't need to come... (voice trails)
confronted: Adult: Sorry, officer, my kid was joking.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police respond to a haunted doll prank, wasting patrol time.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrive to find a teenager laughing.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics sent for a fake attack causing embarrassment.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control checks for 'cursed' — nothing found.

DISMISS.message: Call identified as prank; no action needed.

title: The Celebrity Sighting
description: A caller claims a famous celebrity is trespassing in their backyard.

states.initial: Caller excitedly reports a celebrity sighting.
states.unconvincing: Caller's story becomes inconsistent; laughing heard.
states.hanging_up: Caller abruptly disconnects after hearing adult.

initial_variations: Beyoncé is in my backyard! I swear!
I just saw Taylor Swift climbing over my fence!
Elvis is here! He's alive and in my garden!

unconvincing: Um, {address_location}... but maybe it's a lookalike.

initial: I see {specific_details} hiding behind the shed!

unconvincing: {caller_name}... but this might be a prank.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police dispatched to a celebrity hoax; no one there.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters respond to a fake celebrity sighting.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics sent as precaution; caller playing a joke.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control checks for 'celebrity' — finds a raccoon.

DISMISS.message: Call identified as prank; no dispatch.

title: The Zombie Apocalypse
description: Teenagers fake a zombie attack, claiming the dead are rising.

states.initial: Caller sounds panicked but obviously acting.
states.revealed: Another voice admits it's a prank.

initial_variations: They're everywhere! Zombies are eating people!
The dead are walking! Send the army!
My neighbor turned into a zombie and bit me!

specific_details: a zombie with a torn shirt
a dog that looks like a zombie

revealed: It's {address_location} but it's just Halloween decorations...

losing_it: I saw {specific_details} but it's my brother in a mask.
revealed: Actually, it's {specific_details} from a movie set.

losing_it: I'm {caller_name}... and this is a prank.
It's {caller_name}, sorry for wasting your time.
revealed: We're just kids, {caller_name} and friends... sorry.

losing_it: No, it's okay, we were joking.
revealed: Adult: I apologize, my son and his friends were playing.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police raided the area looking for zombies; prank caused panic.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrived to a zombie hoax; wasted resources.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics dispatched; found teens laughing.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control responds to 'zombies'; finds nothing.

DISMISS.message: Call identified as prank; no action taken.

title: The Time Traveler
description: A caller claims to be from the future and warns of an invasion.

states.initial: Caller speaks in urgent, pseudo-scientific jargon.
states.confused: Caller stumbles over details, reveals modern slang.
states.caller_friend: Friend on the line admits it's a prank.

initial_variations: I'm from 2150! The Chrono-Invaders are coming!
Listen, I'm a time traveler. Send police to stop the attack!
This is Agent X from the future. We need backup now!

address_location: The Temporal Rift at 88 Quantum Avenue
specific_details: a time portal in the sky
a glowing orb in my backyard

confused: Uh, {address_location}? I mean, the coordinates are...
caller_friend: It's {address_location} but it's just an old shed.

initial: I observed {specific_details} with my temporal scanner!
confused: I see {specific_details}... like in the movies.
caller_friend: He's making it up. It's {specific_details} from his imagination.

confused: I'm {caller_name}... actually, I'm just a kid.
Call me {caller_name}... this was a bad idea.
caller_friend: His name is [name] but he's faking.

confused: Wait, maybe I should hang up...
caller_friend: Friend: Hey, we're just messing around. Sorry!

SEND_POLICE.message: Police dispatched for time travel hoax; found pranksters.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters respond to 'temporal rift'; no hazard.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics sent for 'chrono-energy poisoning'; none.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control checks for 'future robots'; nothing.

DISMISS.message: Call identified as prank; no dispatch needed.

title: The UFO Sighting Hoax

states.escalating: Caller becomes more agitated, claiming aliens are emerging.
states.confronted: Caller admits it's a prank after being questioned.
states.resolved: Caller hangs up or is dismissed.

initial_variations: Oh my god, you have to send someone! There's a UFO in my backyard! It's huge with glowing green lights!
This is not a joke. I'm looking at a triangular craft hovering over {address_location}. I can hear a humming noise.
Please help! Something just landed in my yard. I saw humanoid figures walking towards my house!

initial: It's at {address_location}, in the backyard. Hurry!
I already told you, it's at {address_location}!
Are you deaf? {address_location}! The UFO is here!
escalating: They're coming closer! The address is {address_location}, send the army!
I gave you the address, {address_location}! Why aren't you here yet?
confronted: Okay, okay, it was a prank. I'm at {address_location}. No UFO.
Fine, I made it up. {address_location} is just my house.

initial: It's a big triangle with green lights, and I hear a weird {ambient_audio}.
I see {specific_details}. They're just standing there.
escalating: They're moving! One has a weapon. {specific_details} are glowing!
The {ambient_audio} is getting louder. They're surrounding the house!
confronted: I saw a drone with lights. It was a prank, sorry.
Nothing really. I was bored.

initial: I don't have any weapons! They might be armed!
No, but I could grab a baseball bat.
escalating: I have a gun, but it's not loaded! What should I do?
I have a knife, but I'm scared.
confronted: It's a toy gun. Prank, remember?
No weapons because there's no alien.

initial: No injuries yet, but we're terrified!
My neighbor fainted, but that's it.
escalating: One of them grabbed me! It hurt!
I think I sprained my ankle running.
confronted: No one is hurt. It's fake.
Sorry, no injuries. Just a prank.

SEND_POLICE.message: Units arrive to find a teenager with a drone and flashlights. Prank call wastes resources.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire trucks respond to a nonexistent fire. Minor embarrassment for the department.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics find no injuries. Caller admits prank.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control finds no animals or aliens. Caller laughs.

DISMISS.message: Dispatcher recognized the hoax signs and convinced caller to admit prank. No units dispatched.

title: The Celebrity Home Invasion Prank

states.initial: Caller claims a celebrity is breaking in.
states.doubting: Dispatcher expresses skepticism, caller doubles down.
states.confronted: Caller admits it's a joke when challenged.

initial_variations: Oh my God, Taylor Swift is trying to break into my house! She's at the back door!
Send the police! Justin Bieber is climbing through my window right now!
There's a celebrity outside—I think it's Beyoncé—and she's yelling at me. Help!

initial: I'm at {address_location}! Hurry! She's at the door!
doubting: I already told you, {address_location}! Are you coming or not?
Yes, that's my address. Please send someone.
confronted: Fine, it's {address_location}. But I was just joking.
{address_location} is where I am. No celebrity though.

initial: She's wearing a red dress and sunglasses. She looks angry.
He's climbing the window ledge. I think he's drunk.
doubting: I know what I saw! It's {specific_details}, I swear!
I have a photo on my phone. Want me to send it?
confronted: It was a cardboard cutout. My bad.
I saw a lookalike. It was a prank.

initial: No, but I can barricade the door.
I have a bat, but I'm scared to use it.
doubting: I'm not armed. Should I be? Wait, she's getting away!
confronted: I have a water gun. Prank fail.
No weapons. It was all fake.

initial: She scratched the door, but I'm fine.
doubting: My friend tripped and fell, but it's not serious.
confronted: No one hurt. It's a hoax.
Laughing so hard I fell, but that's it.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive to find a fan with a poster. Public mockery and wasted patrol time.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters respond to nonexistent fire. Caller apologizes.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics find no medical emergency. Caller admits prank.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control searches for celebrity—none found.

DISMISS.message: Dispatcher identified the hoax, caller confessed. No resources wasted.

title: The Zombie Outbreak Prank
initial_variations: There's a zombie apocalypse outside! They're banging on my door! Please send help!
I'm surrounded by zombies! They're moaning and trying to get in! This is not a drill!
Oh no, the dead are rising! I can see them shuffling down the street. Send the army!

initial: I'm at {address_location}! They're at the door!
probing: It's {address_location}, same as before! There are more now!
exposed: Okay, I'm at {address_location}. It's a Halloween party, not real zombies.
Fine, {address_location}. But the decorations are cool, right?

initial: They have {specific_details}. They're moaning and reaching for me!
One is wearing a tattered suit, {specific_details}.
probing: They're biting people! I saw a neighbor get bitten!
They're coming from the cemetery nearby!
exposed: I was watching a zombie movie and got carried away. Sorry.
It's a prank. Everyone's in on it except you.

initial: I have a baseball bat. But it won't stop them!
Nothing, I'm hiding in the closet.
probing: I found a chainsaw in the garage!
I'm loading my shotgun. Should I shoot?

initial: Not yet, but they're breaking through!
My buddy got scratched, but he's fine.
probing: My leg is bleeding, but it's just a scratch.
exposed: We're all fine. Trick or treat?

SEND_POLICE.message: Police swarm the area only to find a zombie walk event. Public embarrassment.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire department responds to nonexistent fire. Wasted resources.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics find only costumed pranksters. Minor waste.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control shows up to a party. Caller laughs.

DISMISS.message: Dispatcher recognized the absurdity. Caller admitted prank. No dispatch.

title: The Time Traveler's Distress

states.initial: Caller claims to be from the future.

initial_variations: I'm a time traveler from 2157! I need help preventing a disaster! Send the authorities now!
This is urgent! I've been sent back to warn you about an alien invasion next week! My time machine is broken!
I'm stuck in your timeline. My device is failing. Please send someone to secure my landing site!

skeptical: I told you, {address_location}! This is serious!
You don't believe me? Check {address_location}!
admission: Alright, {address_location}. It's a prank. My friends bet me.
{address_location} is where I am. No time machine.

initial: I have a {specific_details}. It's malfunctioning. I saw the aliens arrive in 2026.
My device is from the year 3000. I need to repair it.
skeptical: I have proof! I brought a future smartphone. It doesn't work here.
Look, I know it sounds crazy, but the invasion is real.
admission: It's a prop from a sci-fi movie. Prank fail.
No details, just a lame joke.

initial: I have a laser gun from the future, but it's low on charge.
skeptical: I could build a weapon if you give me time.
I have a phaser, but it might be a toy.
admission: It's a flashlight. I'm not really armed.

initial: No injuries, but I'm disoriented from the jump.
I twisted my ankle when I landed.
skeptical: I'm fine. It's the future that's in danger!
No injuries. Why do you care?
admission: I'm laughing too hard to be hurt.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police find a man in a costume with a broken microwave. Social media mockery.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters respond to 'time machine'—just a malfunctioning router.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics see a healthy prankster. Minor waste.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrives to find a man with a toy. Caller embarrassed.

DISMISS.message: Dispatcher recognized the hoax, caller confessed. No resources wasted.

title: The Monster Under the Bed

states.initial: Caller reports a monster under a bed.
states.amused: Caller starts laughing or gives absurd details.
states.confronted: Caller admits it's a prank on a child.

initial_variations: There's a monster under my child's bed! It has glowing red eyes! Please send someone to kill it!
I heard growling from under the bed. I think it's a monster! I'm scared to look!
My son says there's a monster under his bed, and now I hear it too! It's scratching the floor!

initial: We're at {address_location}! It's under the bed in the master bedroom!
amused: It's {address_location}. Sorry, I can't stop laughing.
confronted: {address_location}. It was a toy I put under the bed to scare my kid.
Same address, it's just a prank.

amused: It has {specific_details}—and it's wearing my socks! Just kidding.
It's a stuffed monster with {specific_details}. My bad.
confronted: It's a Halloween decoration. No real monster.
Just a cat with a toy. Prank over.

initial: I have a broom. Will that work?
Nothing, we're hiding in the closet.
amused: I have a water gun—but that's for the cat!
My son has a toy sword. Not effective.
confronted: No weapons. It's fake.
A vacuum cleaner? Monster is gone now.

initial: My child is crying, but not hurt.
amused: We're laughing too hard to be hurt.
confronted: None. All safe.
Only injured pride.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police search for monster under bed, find a toy. Caller admits prank. Wasted time.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters respond to 'monster'—nothing. Minor error.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics arrive to a laughing family. No emergency.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control finds a cat under the bed. Caller apologizes.

DISMISS.message: Dispatcher recognized the prank, caller confessed. No units dispatched.

title: Alien Abduction Hoax
description: A caller reports an alien abduction in progress, but the details are inconsistent and background sounds suggest a prank.
initial_variations: Help! Aliens are abducting me at {address_location}! I see a bright light! {ambient_audio}
Oh my god, there's a UFO hovering over {address_location}! They're taking {victim_relation}! {caller_name} here, please hurry!
This is {caller_name}, I'm being taken by extraterrestrials at {address_location}! It's real! {ambient_audio}
911? You won't believe this but aliens are right outside my window at {address_location}! They're {specific_details}!

specific_details: beaming down a ray of light
walking on two legs like humans

initial: Please tell me the location again.
escalating: You already said {address_location}. Is the situation changing?
The location is noted. What's happening now?
revealing: So the address was fake? Where are you really?
This is a prank call, isn't it? Tell me the real location.
dismissed: We've already cleared this call. No need for location.

initial: What do the aliens look like?
escalating: You mentioned they're {specific_details}. Tell me more.
revealing: You're making this up, aren't you? I hear kids in the background.
The details don't add up. This is a hoax.
dismissed: No need for details; we're moving on.

initial: Can I have your full name?
escalating: We have {caller_name}. Is that still accurate?
revealing: You're not {caller_name}, are you? This is a prank.
We'll trace the call, whoever you are.

initial: Are you sure this is an abduction?
escalating: I need you to confirm: is this a real emergency?
Be honest with me. Is this a prank?
revealing: I knew it. You're faking this. We're ending the call.
Confirmation received: hoax.
dismissed: We've already determined this is a hoax.

escalating: Stay on the line until they arrive.
revealing: We won't dispatch for a hoax.
No emergency vehicles will be sent.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrived to find a group of teenagers laughing with a homemade UFO prop. The call was a prank.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire trucks rushed to the scene only to find a Halloween decoration. The caller was pranking.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics found no one injured. The caller admitted it was a joke after being confronted.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control was confused but found no animals. The hoax wasted resources.

DISMISS.message: Correctly identified as a prank. No units dispatched. Caller warned about false reporting.

title: Ghost Hunting Prank
description: Caller claims a ghost is haunting their home, but the evidence points to a prank with hidden speakers and props.
initial_variations: There's a ghost in my house at {address_location}! It's moving things! {ambient_audio}
This is {caller_name}, my {victim_relation} is being attacked by a ghost at {address_location}! {specific_details}
Help! The ghost is pulling me into the basement at {address_location}! {ambient_audio}
I saw a ghostly figure at {address_location}! It said '{specific_details}'! Please come!

ambient_audio: with a child singing a nursery rhyme

initial: What's the address of the haunting?
skeptical: Is this the same address as before? {address_location}?
We need to confirm the location.
revealing: That address is a known prank house. Stop kidding.
The location is fictitious.

initial: How long has this been happening?
skeptical: You said it's {specific_details}. Are you sure?
I hear sounds that sound man-made.
revealing: I can hear you giggling. This is a prank.
The ghost is probably a sibling in a sheet.

skeptical: {caller_name}, is this you? Speak clearly.
We have your number, {caller_name}.
revealing: We know you're {caller_name}. This is a hoax.
Your parents will be informed.

initial: Are you certain it's a ghost?
Could it be a draft or animal?
skeptical: I need you to confirm you're not joking.
Is there a logical explanation?
revealing: I knew it. You faked the ghost sounds.
Confirmation: this is a prank call.

skeptical: We'll verify first before dispatching.
Hold on while we assess.
revealing: No dispatch for a ghost hoax.
Stand down, no units sent.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrived to find a teenager with a spooky sound machine. The call was a prank.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters found no fire or ghost. The caller was hiding and laughing.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medical team saw no injuries. The 'victim' was a doll.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control found stray cats but no ghost. Waste of time.

DISMISS.message: Correctly identified as a prank. No units dispatched. Caller warned.

title: Time Traveler Panic
description: Caller claims to be from the future and warns of an impending disaster, but it's a prank with clever tech.
initial_variations: This is {caller_name} from the year {future_year}! I'm at {address_location}! An asteroid is coming! {ambient_audio}
I'm a time traveler! At {address_location}, a disaster will strike! {specific_details}! {caller_name} here!
Listen to me! I'm from {future_year}! You must evacuate {address_location} now! {ambient_audio}
I know this sounds crazy, but I'm from the future. At {address_location}, {specific_details} is about to happen. This is {caller_name}.

initial: Where are you in the present?
confused: Can you give me a real address?
revealing: That address is fictional. You're not a time traveler.
Your location is a prank.

confused: You mentioned {specific_details}. How do you know?
Describe the technology you used to travel.
revealing: Your details are from a sci-fi movie. This is a hoax.
I hear a timer ticking. Are you using a prop?

confused: {caller_name}, are you really from the future?
revealing: You're {caller_name}, a known prankster.
We'll trace your real identity.

initial: Can you prove you're from the future?
confused: I need you to confirm this is real.
Tell me something only a time traveler would know.
revealing: You can't prove anything. This is a hoax.
Confirmed: not a time traveler.

confused: We'll investigate but won't act yet.
revealing: No action for a prank.
We're not dispatching.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police found a man with a homemade time machine prop. The call was a hoax.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire crews rushed to the scene only to see a group laughing. No emergency.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medical team found no injuries. The caller had a fake ID badge.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control found a robotic dog. The prank wasted resources.

DISMISS.message: Correctly identified as a prank. No units dispatched. Caller warned about false reporting.

title: The Monster Under the Bed
description: A child calls in panic claiming a monster is under their bed, but it's a prank to scare their sibling.

states.confronted: Caller's parent intervenes and reveals the prank.
states.apologetic: Caller admits it's a prank and apologizes.

initial_variations: Please help! There's a {monster_type} under my bed at {address_location}! I can hear it breathing! {ambient_audio}
This is {caller_name}. There's something in my room! It's {monster_size} and it's growling! I'm at {address_location}.
I'm scared! The {monster_type} is trying to get me! {ambient_audio} I need someone to come right now!
Hello? Is this 911? There's a monster under my bed at {address_location}. I'm hiding under my blanket.

confronted: Never mind, I'm not supposed to say.
My mom says I shouldn't talk to you.
I... I don't know where I am.
apologetic: Sorry, I made it up. I'm at {address_location}.
Actually, I'm at {address_location}. I'm sorry for wasting your time.

initial: It's a {monster_type}! It's {monster_size} and has red eyes!
I can hear it {ambient_audio}. It's coming closer!
It's under my bed! I peeked and saw claws!
confronted: My mom says it's just a toy.
My brother pranked me. There's no monster.
I was just pretending.
apologetic: There's no monster. I was trying to scare my sibling.
I made it all up. Sorry.

initial: Why do you need my name? It's {caller_name}.
confronted: I'm {caller_name}. But I'm in trouble now.
My name is {caller_name}, but please don't tell my mom.
apologetic: It's {caller_name}. I won't do it again.

initial: I have a baseball bat but I'm scared to use it.
confronted: No weapons. It's all fake.
My mom took away my toy sword.
apologetic: I don't have any weapons. I was lying.
No, I was just messing around.

initial: No, not yet! But it might eat me!
I'm not hurt, but I'm terrified!
confronted: I'm not hurt. It's a prank.
No injuries. It was a joke.
apologetic: I'm fine. I made it up.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrived to find a child pranking. Wasted resources.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters responded to a monster under the bed prank. Extreme waste of emergency services.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics dispatched for a fictitious monster. Critical misallocation of resources.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrived to find no animal. Minor waste.

DISMISS.message: Call correctly identified as prank. No resources wasted.

title: The Clown Chase
description: A caller claims they are being chased by a group of clowns with chainsaws, but it's a hoax to film reactions.

states.initial: Caller is breathing heavily, sounds scared.
states.mocking: Caller starts laughing and reveals it's a prank.
states.filming: Background voices discuss filming a viral video.
states.standoff: Caller continues the act, trying to sound desperate.

initial_variations: They're after me! Clowns with chainsaws at {address_location}! I'm in the alley behind {specific_details}! {ambient_audio}
This is {caller_name}! I'm being chased by killer clowns! They're right behind me! Send help to {address_location}!
Oh my god, please help! The clowns are everywhere! I'm at {address_location}, I can see them coming! {ambient_audio}
I'm hiding in a dumpster! They almost got me! I'm at {address_location}, behind the {specific_details}. Please hurry!

mocking: Haha, got you! I'm actually at home. {address_location} is fake.
Sorry, it's a prank. We're at {address_location} filming.
filming: We're at {address_location}, but don't send anyone, we're filming a video.
It's a YouTube prank. We're at {address_location}.

initial: There are at least five of them! All wearing clown masks and carrying chainsaws!
They're right behind me! I can smell the gasoline! {ambient_audio}
mocking: It's just my friends in costumes. We're making a TikTok.
There are no clowns. I'm sorry.
filming: We're actors. It's for a prank channel.
It's all staged. No real danger.
standoff: They're surrounding me! I can see their red noses! Please!

mocking: I'm {caller_name}, and I got you good!
standoff: {caller_name}! But please, focus on the clowns!

initial: I have nothing! They have chainsaws!
I grabbed a pipe but it's useless!
mocking: No weapons, just my phone filming.
I have a fake chainsaw prop.
standoff: I wish I had a weapon! They're closing in!

initial: I tripped and scraped my knee.
mocking: No injuries. It's all an act.
standoff: I'm scared but not hurt yet!

SEND_POLICE.message: Police rushed to the scene only to find a group filming a prank. Wasted resources and potential fine for caller.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire department responded to a clown chase. Completely unnecessary dispatch.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics dispatched for fake injuries. Critical waste of medical resources.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrived to find a clown prank. Not applicable.

DISMISS.message: Call identified as prank. No emergency units dispatched.

title: The Bomb Threat Prank
description: A teenager calls in a bomb threat at a school, but it's a prank to get out of a test.

states.warning: Caller starts giving fake details about the bomb.

initial_variations: I'm calling about a bomb at {address_location}! It's in the {specific_details}! You have to evacuate everyone! {ambient_audio}
This is {caller_name}. There's a bomb set to go off in 30 minutes at {address_location}. I'm serious!
Listen, there's a bomb hidden in the {specific_details} at {address_location}. I heard them talking. Please send help!
I can't say much, but I know about a bomb at {address_location}. It's in a {specific_details}. Hurry!

warning: I told you, {address_location}. The bomb is in the {specific_details}.
caught: I'm at school but my mom is here. I'm in trouble.
Never mind, it's a prank. I'm at {address_location}.
confession: It's {address_location}. I lied. I wanted to skip a test.
I'm sorry. There's no bomb. I'm at {address_location}.

initial: I don't know much, just that it's in the {specific_details}.
Someone said they planted it during lunch.
warning: It's a pipe bomb in a backpack. Timer set for 3 PM.
It's in the {specific_details}. I saw them hide it.
caught: There's no bomb. My son is lying.
He's making it all up. He's in trouble.
confession: I made it up. Sorry. I didn't think it would go this far.
No bomb. Just me being stupid.

initial: I can't say my name. I'll be in danger.
warning: I'm {caller_name}. But that's all I'll say.
My name is {caller_name}. I go to this school.
caught: I'm {caller_name}. I'm in the principal's office.
confession: I'm {caller_name}. I'm not a bad kid, I just panicked.

initial: No weapons, just the bomb threat.
warning: I don't have any. I'm just warning you.
caught: No weapons. He's just a kid.
confession: I don't have weapons. I'm not violent.

initial: No injuries yet. But there could be if the bomb goes off!
warning: No injuries. That's why you need to evacuate.
confession: No one is hurt. I'm sorry.
All safe. It was a lie.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police and bomb squad deployed, only to find a prank. Massive waste of resources and public panic.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire department responded to a bomb threat hoax. Unnecessary risk and cost.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medical units dispatched for a fake bomb threat. Waste of emergency services.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control dispatched in error. Not relevant.

DISMISS.message: Call correctly identified as prank. No resources wasted. Caller may face charges.
